entry.title: No show status in employee profile can the candidate be moved out from hired status
entry.content:
Hi,

if a new hire status is changed as "No Show" in employee profile, is it feasible to move that candidate from hired status in Job Requisition to decline status when job requisition is closed.

Any thoughts to achieve the above. SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding  SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting 

thank you

Regards

Vish

entry.title: Re: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for Singapore Peppol eInvoices (InvoiceNow) - Part 1
entry.content:
@PranavSanyo 

In the SAP DRC Peppol Dashboard, choose the test environment and you can register with prefix "SGTST"+UEN e.g. SGTST202566666D (Not SGUEN+UEN) and choose option "Sign with PDF". 

You need to upload letter of authorization in PDF form, see sample of authorization letter at Link 

This is for testing purpose. For actual registration, corppass authentication is required.

entry.title: Re: Error starting IntegrationSolutions Addon
entry.content: May i know from where I can download the IntegrationSolutionsAddon.ard

entry.title: Re: No Shows after 30 days of Hire date
entry.content: @karenperez After No show status is updated in EC, can the candidate be moved from Hired Status to Decline Status in Closed Job Requisition.

entry.title: May i know where I can download/find the IntegrationSolutionsAddon.ard
entry.content:
From what I have read, it seems like IntegrationSolutionsAddon.ard is one of the add-on to be installed if I want to use the integration solution, but I am not able to find the installer in the sap portal or the standard SAP installer.

if there is anyone who knows where I can get the IntegrationSolutionsAddon.ard, can you be kind enough to give me steps to reach the installer in the SAP portal?

entry.title: Re: Eclipse BW Bridge Project: Logon to the service insta...
entry.content: mitko1994, have you found a solution for this? I'm facing the same issue.

entry.title: Re: Understanding OAuth 2.0 Behavior in SAP Datasphere’s Generic OData Connection
entry.content:
Hello @marcw15 ,

in your opinion, is it better to extract data from OData with a dataflow (and add some parameters to make more reliable the connection)

or with a remote table through Odata Adapter?

Which is the most solid option?

We find that many times we get less rows than expected or randomly failures. sometimes we need to add as parameter $inlinecount = allpages or $count , other times we add batch query options.

I agree with you that it lacks transparency, sometimes we need to capture the calls and try them with postman

entry.title: ObjectTable swipe behaviour not working
entry.content:
Hi,

I am facing an issue with implementing swipe behaviour in ObjectTable.

Scenario:

  1. I have added a ObjectCell to display list of notifications.
  2. If the user right swipes on a row, user to able to delete the notification.
  3. After clicking on a single row of list, user is navigated to detail screen.
  4. Once user comes back from detail screen, the above clicked row item is not showing swipe behaviour. If the user tries to swipes on other rows, the behaviour is working as expected.

Please provide your guidance.

MDK SDK used: 24.11.2-002

entry.title: Re: Eclipse BW Bridge Project: Logon to the service insta...
entry.content: @SylviaD, For me it was an authorizations problem which was resolved.

entry.title: HTML company code logo image in the invoice form for interactive signs through Digital Signature
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We have implemented the Digital Signature at company code level, however the client has one root certificate across all 5 company codes. Client requirement is to showcase 5 different company code logo images in the invoice form and link it with Digital signature .pfx file. We informed them to have 5 diff root certificate for the same. Also we cannot display any image and hyperlink the digital signature on it.

Experts please suggest how to achieve this or any workaround we can do. I am unable to get any appropriate SAP blog to convince our client.

entry.title: Re: Universal Display Hierarchy - Display values on all h...
entry.content:
Hi,

The described behavior occurs, if the Totals are hidden. You need to enable the display of Totals in the properties of the child (!) dimension to see numbers at parent level.

regards

entry.title: Re: F5104, Intercompany billing EDI
entry.content: I suggest to debug inbound IDOC posting and check where this value for vendor number comes from. Unfortunately without access to the system, I can only guess what is wrong.

entry.title: Re: Why SAP BDC for Consuming SAP Data via CDS Views and not Replicate in Non-SAP Platform
entry.content:
some ponts are not true, 

before RFC/ODP limitation note to third party systems, the fields from CDS Views have business names => the fact that the fields "have SAP technical name" is not true. 

The real problem is that, the choice of the data warehouse is secondary, the primary choice is the front end tool for BI!!

If a customer wants to stay with a vendor that is different from SAP in the front end, it will crush against SAP limitation on usage of ODP, it will require to install Datasphere and pay "premium outbound flows" just to export HIS (customer) data to another data warehouse. the other option is to use Odata but it requires many manual activities in SAP S/4 to expose CDS views as ODP with delta in Odata (& it requires to manage complex recovery flows in the third party ETL / DWH tool).

This cost of "premium outbound flows" or manual activities to bypass RFC/ODP limitation can be soo high that customer may want to keep using SAP Data Services to extract data through ODP instead of "buying" Datasphere.

entry.title: Data Access Control in Data Builder and Authorization Scenario in Business Builder - SAP Datasphere.
entry.content:
Hello All,

Welcome back to my other blog post on an exciting feature available in SAP Datasphere: the data access control in Data Builder and the authorization scenario in Business Builder. This blog post will explain this concept with an example and demo.

In this blog post, I am not going to discuss what data access control in data builder is and what the authorization scenario in business builder is. You can go to the official documentation of SAP and can understand the concept. 

We will develop a business case in this blog post, which can also assist you in developing your scenario for a real-time project. Now, straight away, let us get into the demo and understand in detail.

First, let us create a product category hierarchy table, as in this post I will explain DAC based on hierarchy, and then we will move into creating a DAC based on a table and then an authorization scenario in Business Builder.

Now let us go to the dataset of this table.

So my hierarchy table is created, and it is ready.

To further implement DAC, we need a control table that will control the access; in short, we are going to create a permission table. This is a must when we create DAC, as it is going to control the activity and will provide row-level access to users who actually want to view the data. you can read more about permission table and its usage.

Now let us create a permission table.

Business Name : Permission Entity Product Category

Technical Name: PE_ProductCategory

 So now our control table or permission table is created.

Now we are set to create our data access control object, which we are going to apply to a final view. So let us create a data access control. Go to data builder and create a new DAC.

So we are all set with our data access control now. Now let us create a view and apply the DAC to the view.

So, I have created a view with the name Sales View Fact, and I have a product table. Kindly see below.

 

we are going to join this 2 tables with Product ID

 

Now let us apply the data access control to the final view. Please follow the image below.

Now let us view the data in the Sales View Fact table.

 

So, we have successfully implemented the data access control based on a parent-child hierarchy. Similarly, we can maintain many user ids as per requirement and can view the data applying data access control to users.

Now, in the next blogpost, I shall create again a data access control and apply the data access control to a new authorization scenario in Business Builder.

Thank You.

Narasingha.

entry.title: Re: Error message requesting more days than you have in y...
entry.content:
Hi @camilaromero yes, we find a workaround. Maybe there are more ways but ew have solve with this one.

We have created a take tule inside the time type in scope, that check the balance and then you can put the translation in Norwegian with the message that you want. And to avoid double message (because the one by default in the system will be shown) you can put the cannot fall below with a certain number in the time account type, to make sure that it is not going to affect the first check. 

If you have different time types linked to time account types that should be review, make sure to put in different rules because if not the rule is going to take the full balance of all the time types inside.

The take rule is a simple one, with a "calculate balance for types" , with a create date from the beginning of the year till end of year to take the full time account balance, and with <= 0. then you can select here the time account in scope. And "or" condition linked to the previous one, that check the "employee time.number of days" > calculate balance for types (and the same create date, from the beginning till end of year). Then, Raise a message with the custom message that you will put. 

The only problem with this is that you need to take into account the cannot fall below number and make sure that this is not going to impact your configuration. In our case, will not affect because it is not a real cannot fall below, the check it is going to be done in the take rule with the balance. 

 

I hope this helps you 🙂 let me know if you try this solution finally

 

BR,

Nuria

entry.title: Re: MDG-M Standard Fields are not editable
entry.content:
Hi Rei,

the field properties BAdI in the method IF_EX_USMD_ACC_FLD_PROP_CDS~MODIFY_FLD_PROP_ATTR does not belong to the FPM. Hence, I cannot answer your question why it only works for the Basic Data.

Best regards
Jens

entry.title: Re: Eclipse BW Bridge Project: Logon to the service insta...
entry.content: @mitko1994, thanks for the answer. What kind of authorization problem wa it? Was it an issue with the user for the BW-Bridge Cockpit or something else?

entry.title: Credit Check for hierarchical group of customer!
entry.content:
Use Case:

Credit check for a group of customers: many times, an organization wants to do credit check at a group level, when the customer is group of organization having multiple sub-units. This scenario arises when the customer is a holding company having more than one subsidiary and the seller company wants to maintain a floating credit limit for the subsidiaries and an absolute limit at the holding company level.

Example:

In the table at the group level the credit limit is USD 160, and this is total of the credit limits at the subsidiary level. The idea is when one of the subsidiaries run out of credit the credit analyst can manually adjust the limit to the extent of available limits with the other subsidiaries and yet the total limit at the group level remains at USD 160. Credit limits for a BP can be maintained in the app ‘Manage Credit Accounts’. 

Master Data Setup and Configuration:

The group structure can be maintained by defining the BP relationships: maximum 10 levels of hierarchy can be maintained. This hierarchy can also be imported via an excel sheet. The data must be maintained in the template provided in the app ‘Import Credit Account Hierarchies’. The relationship categories being used here are ‘Superordinate Credit Account From’ and ‘Subordinate Credit Account To’.

Once we maintain this relationship for the Superordinate Credit Account From, the relationship for the Subordinate Credit Account To is automatically maintained in the system, as shown in the snapshot:

The credit account hierarchy can also be seen in the app ‘manage credit accounts’ under a credit segment:

Test the scenario:

Our objective is to block a sales order (SO) not only at the sub-unit level but also at the group level in case the credit limit fails. Usually, the group level credit limit is higher than the individual units and the credit analyst keeps a floating limit for the sub-units to maximize the sales.

When we create an SO for a subunit the credit limit is not only checked at the sub0unit level but also at the group level.

Case: When the credit check fails at the sub-unit level but not at the group level. In this case the credit analyst can manually adjust the credit limit of the entire group keeping the group level limit same and yet approve the SO at the sub-unit level:

Case: When credit check fails for sub-unit as well as at the group level: in such cases the SO cannot go through and needs other measures to release the case.

Note: the messages in the above test cases appear after changing the total SO value (to demonstrate both the cases).

Conclusion:

It is possible to perform a credit check at a group level for complex group structure kind of customers. However manual adjustments for maintaining the floating credit limits are required, nonetheless it serves the purpose!

entry.title: Filter query not working after setting target specifier in List Picker
entry.content:
Hi,

Scenario:

We are having two listpicker components: 1. for state and 2. for location. We want to populate location list once user selects state from state listpicker. To achieve this we have followed this blog.
And this is working as expected.

We also have implemented rule to make location listpicker's search functionality case insensitive. But once user selects state, this rule defined for search is not working as expected as it gets overridden on the value change event of state list picker.

Please guide us to resolve this issue.

MDK version: 24.11.2-002

Regards,

Girish

entry.title: Re: MISSING MANDATE REFERENCE
entry.content:
Hello Davide,

Thanks for the question. 

After talking to the experts, I can provide the following answer: The SEPA Mandate related functionality is not implemented in the "Upload Customer Open Items" and "Create Outgoing Invoices" (FB70) apps.

You may request features on the Customer Influence Portal. We continuously review and prioritize feature requests based on customer feedback.

Kind regards,

Anne

entry.title: Re: CJ20N: Zugriffskontrollliste (ACL)
entry.content:
Hallo, 

die ACL ist meines Wissens veraltet. Hier findest du weitere Infos: 

522426 - Beratung: Berechtigungen im Projektsystem - SAP for Me

Zudem gibt es eine Erweiterung, welche die über den Tcode CMOD ausprägen kannst: 

Die Erweiterung CNEX0002 enthält folgende Komponenten:

 o   EXIT_SAPLCNAU_001: PS Customer-Exit zur Berechtigungsprüfung der Projektdefinition

 o   EXIT_SAPLCNAU_002: PS Customer-Exit zur Berechtigungsprüfung von PSP-Elementen

 o   EXIT_SAPLCNAU_003: PS Customer-Exit zur Berechtigungsprüfung des Netzplankopfs

 o   EXIT_SAPLCNAU_004: PS Customer-Exit zur Berechtigungsprüfung von Vorgänge im Netzplan

 o   EXIT_SAPLCNAU_005: PS Customer-Exit zur Berechtigungsprüfung von Meilensteinen

 o   EXIT_SAPLCNAU_006: PS Customer-Exit zur Berechtigungsprüfung von PS-Texten

 Diesen Funktionsbausteinen wird neben den Attributen des zu prüfenden

 Objekts (z.B. PSP-Element oder Vorgang) weitere Information übergeben:

 o   Aktivität

     Die Berechtigungsaktivität unterscheidet, wie auf die Information

     zugegriffen wird (anzeigen, ändern). Bitte entnehmen sie die

     verwendeten Werte der Dokumentation der

     Standard-Berechtigungsobjekte des Projekt Systems.

 o   Messagetyp

     Dieser Parameter bestimmt den Messagetyp mit dem eine Meldung (z.B

     bei fehlender Berechtigung) auszugeben ist.

 o   Rückgabewerte

     Der Funktionsbaustein muß ein Kennzeichen (X) zurückliefern, das

     gesetzt ist, wenn der Benutzer die entsprechende Berechtigung hat.

Hinterlasse gerne Kudos, wenn dir die Infos weitergeholfen haben. 

Viele Grüße 

Tobias

entry.title: New Region cn20 Now Available on SAP BTP in China, Powered by Microsoft Azure!
entry.content:
News

We are excited to announce the availability of a new region, technically named cn20, on the BTP (Business Technology Platform) in China. This new region, built on Microsoft Azure and referred to as China North 3 (Hebei), is now open for BTP customers. This expansion offers BTP customers more options and greater flexibility.

Please find the available regions on the BTP in China below:

IaaS ProviderRegionRegion NameTechnical KeyTechnical Key of IaaS ProviderNAT IPs (egress, IPs for requests from a Cloud Foundry app)LB IPs (ingress, for incoming requests)API EndpointDomainCockpit Logon
Microsoft Azurecn20China North 3 (Hebei)cf-cn20ChinaNorth3159.27.65.75, 159.27.107.117, 159.27.217.233143.64.224.195api.cf.cn20.platform.sapcloud.cncn20.platform.sapcloud.cnOpen Cockpit
Alibaba Cloudcn40China (Shanghai)cf-cn40cn-shanghai101.132.190.155, 106.14.165.33, 106.14.184.113139.224.7.71api.cf.cn40.platform.sapcloud.cncn40.platform.sapcloud.cnOpen Cockpit

 

How to Consume Region CN20 on BTP in China

You can deploy applications in different regions. Each region represents a geographical location (for example, Europe, US East) where applications, data, or services are hosted. Regions are provided either by SAP or by our Infrastructure-as-a-Service (IaaS) partners Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud, and Alibaba Cloud. The third-party region providers operate the infrastructure layer of the regions, whereas SAP operates the platform layer and Cloud Foundry.

A region is chosen at the subaccount level. For each subaccount, you select exactly one region. The selection of a region is dependent on many factors: For example, application performance (response time, latency) can be optimized by selecting a region close to the user.

Note that the BTP in China operates independently from other regions. This means you can only select and use regions within China (specifically cn20 or cn40) under a Global Account designated for China. In other words, you cannot use a Global Account created for other regions to consume cn20 or cn40 in China. You can identify the Global Account by the Cockpit link. For China, the link is https://cockpit.cn40.platform.sapcloud.cn/cockpit. Note that both cn20 and cn40 regions share the same Cockpit link with the subdomain “cn40,” as cn40 is considered the central region, while cn20 is the local region. These distinctions are mainly for internal account management purposes and do not require much attention from your side.

Step 1: Open the Global Account on the BTP in China

Open the Cockpit via the entry link: https://cockpit.cn40.platform.sapcloud.cn/cockpit.

For more information, see Managing Global Accounts and Subaccounts Using the Cockpit.

Step 2: Create a Subaccount and Select Region

On your Global Account page, click on the Create → Subaccount button.

Provide the required details for your new Subaccount, and choose the region that you need.

For example: cn20-live

For more information, see Managing Global Accounts and Subaccounts Using the Cockpit.

Step 3: Enable Cloud Foundry

Click on the tile of your subaccount, and then click on Enable Cloud Foundry.

Enter a name for the organization.

Click Create.

Then you will find that the API Endpoint is https://api.cf.cn20.platform.sapcloud.cn, which is hosted on Microsoft Azure.

Next, you can continue with your consumption of the BTP.

 

FAQ

Q: If I want to use cn20, can I reuse the Global Account outside of the BTP in China?

A: No. The BTP in China operates independently from other regions. This means you can only select and use regions within China (specifically cn20 or cn40) under a Global Account designated for China. In other words, you cannot use a Global Account created for other regions to consume cn20 or cn40 in China. You can identify the Global Account by the Cockpit link. For China, the link is https://cockpit.cn40.platform.sapcloud.cn/cockpit. Note that both cn20 and cn40 regions share the same Cockpit link with the subdomain “cn40,” as cn40 is considered the central region, while cn20 is the local region. These distinctions are mainly for internal account management purposes and do not require much attention from your side.

Q: Do I need a new Global Account to use cn20?

A: No. If you have already been using cn40, it means that you already have a Global Account on the BTP in China. You simply need to create a subaccount for cn20 under this Global Account.

Q: I have configured a custom domain using SAP Custom Domain Service on cn40 to deploy applications. Do I need to recreate the custom domain and complete the filing procedures on cn20?

A: Yes. You still need to follow the steps in this blog to configure and file the domain: SAP BTP上实现自定义域名配置. The difference is that you need to complete the filing procedures on Azure.

Q: Can the SKUs purchased for cn40 also be used on cn20?

A: The consumption remains the same, but the billing is done separately for each region. For example, if you want to use the Integration Suite in both cn40 and cn20, you need to purchase two quotas of the Integration Suite.

Q: Are CPEA or BTPEA available on cn20?

A: Similar to cn40, currently, only the subscription commercial model is supported in China.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) Integration with SAP Apps and 3rd Party Apps !
entry.content:
The main concern right now is the very limited availability of source systems for pushing non-SAP data into the Datasphere object store(HDLF). This is crucial because the object store enables zero-copy/delta sharing while leveraging the medallion architecture on cost-effective HDLF storage.

Additionally, sharing Datasphere HANA database tables with the object store is not possible, making it challenging to integrate other source data using Data Flow. This limitation arises because Data Flow is not applicable for object store spaces, restricting its usage to HANA disk-based Datasphere spaces. Given the need to support a large number of source systems, it would be more practical to enable Data Flow and object data sharing from non-HDLF to HDLF spaces.

entry.title: Re: Eclipse BW Bridge Project: Logon to the service insta...

entry.title: how do I cancel or reverse a cancel.invoice(s1) document when its not released yet.
entry.content:
We tried reversing an invoice document type F2 with vf11. It produced a cancellation document "cancel.invoice(S1)" but we failed to release we were reversing an invoice from a closed financial period and we captured an old billing date.

We now want to cancel the cancellation document so that recapture a proper cancellation document and also give it a current Billing date. How do we cancel a cancellation document  (cancel.invoice.S1)?

entry.title: Re: SMB Adapter for SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello,

we have a big problem. Wwe use the SMB Receiver Adapter and write via append multiple messages to it.

But there seams to be no "write lock" control or "concurrency" control as in the old file Adapter.

When 2 messages arrives the same time...both write in  the File at the same time and the result is a disaster. At the Edge Integration Cell also no EOIO is not yet available.

 

Any idea or solution ?

In your case, you need to specify the actual Google user’s email address, not the service account’s bot email.

Pichka17

entry.title: Re: How to use custom LLM end-points with SAP Generative...
entry.content:
Hi @Cocquerel 

the key aspect of your question is you need to register the LLM you have built on GCP or AWS as an Artifact in AI Core and then deploy it as a Proxy

Follow the steps in this guide and let us know how it goes https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/the-5-steps-to-consume-amazon-bedrock-and-azure-openai-generative-ai/ba-p/13580305

entry.title: Re: SMB Adapter for SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"SMB Adapter can be used to implement various file-based solutions, a few of them are:

  • SMB Operations Support: Offers support for all major file operations: Create, Read, Write, List, and Delete files.
  • Dynamic configuration with headers and properties: Assigning dynamic values to different properties allows enhanced flexibility to your integration flows. You can also refer to dynamic parameters using SAP Cloud Integration exchange headers and properties.
  • Secure authentication and encryption for 3.x SMB dialects: Your communications over SMB network shares are done through secure and encrypted channels for all SMB dialects above 3.0."

 

Thanks for your kindly sharing, it really help us a lot.

 

🙂

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud - 無法copy Purchase Requisition Header Note去Purchase Order Header Text
entry.content:
在SAP Public Cloud上面，當convert PR to PO的時候，客戶想PR的Header Note複製過去PO的Header Text

我找到一個論壇上講standard做不了，但是可以在custom logic app使用BADIs, e.g. Modification of Purchase Order Header.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/copy-purchase-requisition-header-note-to-purchase-order/qaq-p/12369331

我們technical同事嘗試加logic, 但沒有作用， PR Header Note複製不了去PO Header Text。

請問有沒有什麼建議和用什麼BADIs可以成功加這個logic。謝謝

Margit

entry.title: Re: Couldn"t find transport requests in BW bridge (Ec...
entry.content:
Hi @Surya_Kota, 

Have you checked the Transport Organizer view for the the ABAP Cloud project of your BW bridge tenant?

If the transport requests have been created by another user, you may remove the default filter on your business user by right-clicking the BB8 project name in the Transport Organizer, then Configure Tree. Set '*' as User Name.

Regards
Dominik

entry.title: Hide fields for Onboardee but not for recruiter
entry.content:
Hi Onboarding experts,

How can I hide fields for the onboardee, but not for the recruiter and vice versa - how can I hide fields for the recruiter but not the onboardee? I am not talking about the Review new hire data steps and the personal data collection step.

Thanks!

entry.title: Enhancing Your SAP FSM Experience with Continuous Quality Checks
entry.content:
Are you implementing SAP Field Service Management (SAP FSM) or managing its day-to-day operations? In both scenarios, ensuring the quality and stability of your solution is vital. SAP Enterprise Support offers continuous quality checks to help you achieve this. Continuous quality checks are included as part of your SAP Enterprise Support cloud edition maintenance contract, embedded in your SAP FSM subscription at no extra cost.


SAP Field Service Management solution supports your technicians with mobile tools, accelerating issue resolution and making the service experience effortless for customers. As an AI cloud enabled solution, SAP FSM contributes to increased customer satisfaction through proactive service features.

Below is a list of continuous quality checks (CQCs) available to support your SAP FSM solution, tailored to your specific implementation phase and needs:

 

ServiceBenefitWhen to request
CQC for Deployment Readiness for SAP FSM

Ensures operational efficiency and readiness by performing a detailed analysis of your SAP FSM, either before go-live or as a "health check" for your productive systems.

(Highly recommended) 
Realize phase - Two months prior to go live 

(Proactive) Run phase 

 

Additional Resources and Support:

This blog post* offers a detailed information about CQC for Deployment Readiness for SAP FSM, including guidance on how to request them.

For more information on other CQC service offerings for supply chain solutions, visit the Continuous Quality Checks* section of our Supply Chain Management Solutions value map*.

*To access the link and for ongoing support and actionable guidance tailored to your unique SAP journey, we invite you to join and explore SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps. 

Enhance Your SAP Experience with Value Maps 

Beyond CQC services, SAP Enterprise Support offers additional resources to help you drive innovation. SAP Enterprise Support value maps provide expert-led resources, tailored recommendations, and advisory services - all included in your SAP cloud subscription. Get started today: 

  • One-time sign up for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, using a valid S-User ID (please allow up to 2 hours for processing) 
  • Access SAP Enterprise Support value maps for personalized guidance 
  • Request a call with our solution area experts for tailored advice 

Value Maps are part of SAP Enterprise Support commitment to your success. Visit the SAP Enterprise Support value maps landing page to explore our range of topics and start engaging with us today. 

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

About the author: 

  • Mabelle Roque Miguel is a Focus Advisor for SAP Enterprise Support value maps for SAP Supply Chain Management solutions. Based in Singapore, Mabelle has been with SAP since 2007, taking on diverse roles that have largely centered around customer engagement and success. Now, her focus is on guiding businesses through their supply chain journey, helping them accelerate the adoption of SAP supply chain management solutions with value map content and SAP Enterprise Support offerings.

Have questions, comments or feedback? Don't hesitate to comment down below or contact @Mabelle.

entry.title: The file " is not open, error in source sysem
entry.content:
Dear Sir/Madam,

The below code is working when executing infopackage manaully, where as in executing process chain

getting error in source system, THE FILE " IS NOT OPEN. I HAVE BEEN SEARCHING THE SOLUTION SINCE FROM 10 DAYS, i am not able to solve.seeking your help to load sucCessfull with process chain,

 

 

DATA: V_DIR TYPE EPS2FILNAM
VALUE 'path is hardcoded',

* V_MASK TYPE EPSF-EPSFILNAM VALUE 'I009_DFDVFPSL_*',
IT_DIR_LIST TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF EPS2FILI,
WA_DIR_LIST TYPE EPS2FILI,
P_FLNAME TYPE rsfilenm,
P_FILENAM TYPE rsfilenm.

CALL FUNCTION 'EPS2_GET_DIRECTORY_LISTING'
EXPORTING
IV_DIR_NAME = V_DIR
* FILE_MASK = V_MASK
* IMPORTING
* DIR_NAME =
* FILE_COUNTER =
* ERROR_COUNTER =
TABLES
DIR_LIST = IT_DIR_LIST
EXCEPTIONS
INVALID_EPS_SUBDIR = 1
SAPGPARAM_FAILED = 2
BUILD_DIRECTORY_FAILED = 3
NO_AUTHORIZATION = 4
READ_DIRECTORY_FAILED = 5
TOO_MANY_READ_ERRORS = 6
EMPTY_DIRECTORY_LIST = 7
OTHERS = 8.

IF SY-SUBRC IS INITIAL AND IT_DIR_LIST IS NOT INITIAL.
CLEAR: P_FLNAME ,P_FILENAME.
* Get filename and file Details
SORT IT_DIR_LIST by name.
LOOP AT IT_DIR_LIST INTO WA_DIR_LIST.
if WA_DIR_LIST-name CS 'ZABC'.

P_FLNAME = WA_DIR_LIST-name.
CONCATENATE V_DIR '/' P_FLNAME INTO P_FILENAM.
EXIT.
ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.
ENDIF.
p_filename = P_FILENAM.
p_filename = p_filenam.
p_subrc = 0.

entry.title: "Error connecting to SAP GUI: (-2147221020, 'Invalid syntax', None, None)"
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a problem with the following error:

"Error connecting to SAP GUI: (-2147221020, 'Invalid syntax', None, None)"

This issue occurs when I convert my script into an .exe file using PyInstaller. The error appears only on devices other than the one where the script was originally built.

The problem is connected with function connect_to_sap()

SAP scripting is enabled, and another script I created works correctly without any issues.

What could be causing this problem?

Please let me know if you need more details.

 

import time
import win32com.client  # Biblioteka do interakcji z SAP GUI przez COM
import pandas as pd  # Importuje Pandas do pracy z danymi w Excelu
from datetime import datetime, timedelta  # Importuje datetime i timedelta do pracy z datami
import pyperclip
import openpyxl
import os
import psutil
import time
import re
import subprocess
import msal
import requests
import os
from win32com.client import CDispatch

system_name = "P01 One ERP Production System"


def run_sap_logon():
    """
    Function starts the SAP Logon application.
    """
    sap_logon_path = r"C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP\FrontEnd\SAPgui\saplogon.exe"  # Path to SAP Logon application
    try:
        subprocess.Popen([sap_logon_path])  # Starts the SAP Logon application
        print("✅ SAP Logon application started.")
        time.sleep(5)  # Wait for 5 seconds to allow SAP Logon to initialize
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error starting SAP Logon: {e}")

def connect_to_sap(system_name):
    """
    Function connects to an open SAP GUI session and returns the session object,
    selecting the appropriate system based on the name.
    """
    try:
        # Get the SAP GUI object
        SapGuiAuto = win32com.client.GetObject("SAPGUI")
        application = SapGuiAuto.GetScriptingEngine  # Get the SAP scripting engine

        if application is None:
            print("SAP GUI scripting engine not found!")
            return None

        time.sleep(2)

        # Check if there are any open connections
        if len(application.Connections) > 0:
            print(f"Found {len(application.Connections)} open connections.")
            for connection in application.Connections:
                conn_description = connection.Description  # Get the connection description (no parentheses)
                print(f"Connection description: {conn_description}")  # Debugging output
                
                if conn_description == system_name:  # Check if we have the correct connection
                    print(f"Found connection to {system_name}")
                    session = connection.Children(0)  # Retrieve the first session
                    print("Session successfully connected.")
                    return session
            else:
                print(f"No connection to {system_name} found. Trying to open it.")
                # Open the specified SAP connection if it was not found already
                connection = application.OpenConnection(system_name, True)
                print(f"✅ Opened connection to {system_name}")

        else:
            print("✅ No open connections found. Attempting to open the system connection.")
            connection = application.OpenConnection(system_name, True)
            print(f"✅ Opened connection to {system_name}")

        # Retrieve the first session
        session = connection.Children(0)  # Get the first child session
        print("✅ Session successfully connected.")
        return session

    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error connecting to SAP GUI: {e}")
        return None

entry.title: Re: Joule for Developers FAQ: Features, Access and More
entry.content: how i can use joule in eclipse

entry.title: Re: New SAP LeanIX adapter for SAP Integration Suite is available!
entry.content:
Hi @thorsten-d,

I've received feedback from Rojo Consultancy (which implemented the standard adapter). The problem was a wrong target URL. Instead of providing the entire path for the GraphQL query (as we did in our custom IFlow before) only the host is supposed to be configured:

  • WRONG: https://<yourdomain>.leanix.net/services/pathfinder/v1/graphql
  • CORRECT: https://<yourdomain>.leanix.net

The rest is handled by the adapter directly.

Best regards,
Sebastian

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud - 如何創建自定义字段，在Email Template上使用
entry.content:
如何創建Z field/Z variable，在Email Template上使用。

Purchase Requisition Approval使用了這個Email Template: YY1_02000458_CRT_ALL

Template裡面有很多variable, 例如: {{TaskName}}, {{TaskStatus}}

請問能否更改varaible的內容，要在哪個地方更改?

另外，可否創建自定义字段，在Email Template上使用？請問在那裡創建？

 

謝謝!

entry.title: SUM prerequisite Extended check is stuck at phase CONFLICT_CHECK
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are performing ECC 6.0 EHP 7 to S/4HANA 2023 FPS02 conversion and we have run sum extended prerequisite check. SUM is stuck at phase PREP_EXTENTION/CONFLICT_CHECK for more than 24 hours. No logs are getting updated in CONFLCHK.LOG and SUM is not even throwing any error. We have restarted the SUM session again but same issue.

Could you please provide any suggestion.

Thanks,

i want to use joule in eclipse

how can i install it

entry.title: Re: Determine Partner from one Bill To party to Multiple...
entry.content: Hi  @GauthierVictor , I have updated my comments to your reply for my question "Determine Partner from one Bill To party to Multip... - SAP Community" Could you please give your inputs on it. I'm using 0S02- Multi Payee condition contract type, with sold to parties mentioned in the business volume criteria and the condition records are maintained for each Sold To party in the condition contract(CCM).  The ask is, we have one bill to party assigned to multiple Sold to Parties. During the settlement to customers, system should determined the condition record of each Sold to Party in the settlement document. At present system is considering only one same sold to party in all the settlement documents created against the condition contract and determining the condition record of that one Sold To party. During debug, it is understood that every time system is considering the first sold party assigned to the bill to party and determining the condition record of it in Settlement Document. Please help and provide your inputs for this.

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP HANA Cloud – March 2025
entry.content:
The ability to create an HANA Cloud instance from a backup of another one is very interesting. However, regarding the contents of the HDI containers within the database schemas, how can they be connected to a new HDI Container instance?

As a customer, we would like to establish a procedure to recreate an environment (for specific testing scenarios) by duplicating the application, the database, and also the HDI Container configurations.

Is there any specific documentation on the backup, restore, and subsequent reattachment of the HDI Container?

Many thanks, 
Davide Bruno

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP Sales Cloud V2 and SAP Emarsys via SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi @dxps,
Thanks for your question! This is not a standard iFlow from the SAP API Business Hub. It’s a custom-built iFlow built with SAP Integration Suite to demonstrate how the integration between SAP Sales Cloud V2 and SAP Emarsys can be implemented.

entry.title: Re: How to automate the deploy some PAPM processes
entry.content:
Hi Stefano,

depending on the PaPM version you are using, you have different options:

  • For PaPM Cloud only (assuming Standard Model), you could leverage the integrated Process Scheduler: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_PROFITABILITY_PERFORMANCE_MANAGEMENT_CLOUD/56471df1959f4cfd9e3bf7a6d2d5be42/719f49c4c12c422d8043ac976c59c9de.html
  • For both PaPM OP/PCE and PaPM Cloud (Standard Model), you could leverage an external scheduler (you should check options with your IT) and integrate it with the provided APIs:
    • Help Portal page for PaPM OP/PCE: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_PROFITABILITY_PERFORMANCE_MANAGEMENT/2860ea0d9d464b8f91e4a9c0f652fe22/6469c4b8bf2444749e4c6b0079b414fe.html 
    • Help Portal page for PaPM Cloud: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_PROFITABILITY_PERFORMANCE_MANAGEMENT_CLOUD/184efabaccdc4175b97223affaf7e5f8/ab063b9876034e6d988edef55b74f6f8.html 

Hope it helps!
Emanuele

entry.title: Re: My Inbox Showing Blank
entry.content: Hi Nazarene, Check if there is any error with the OData service. Maybe the service has an extension that isn't maintaining the cardinality.

entry.title: Re: Accept deviation does not work sap customer checkout...
entry.content:
Hi Sebastián

In your picture I see an inconsistency between expected and received receipts. I would first check if there are missing or not correctly booked receipts or cash transactions -first in monitor then on the checkouts. If you find some, then verify the sales summary. Then I would verify the installed version of customer checkout monitor.

BR

Klaus

entry.title: Implementation of BADI MM_PUR_S4_RFQ_MODIFY_PRINT_ITM is not called when we print custom output form
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We create an implementation of BADI MM_PUR_S4_RFQ_MODIFY_PRINT_ITM to pass the custom field data to the RFQ custom output form. When we create the output for RFQ, we have custom form printed but the BADI implementation was not called. We have checked through Custom Logic trace as well.

Do we need to perform any additional step to call the BADI implementation.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Connection from BTP ABAP System to PostgreSQL DB via ODBC
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Are we able to connect Postgresql db from BTP ABAP system via ODBC ? 

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

entry.title: Currency other than official for a localized country
entry.content:
Dear experts,

we completed CLT process for Malta in S/4HANA Public Cloud. Upon creating a CoCd in the new country, we realized that local currency has been automatically set to EUR, and there was not way to influence this at any stage of the process. Apparently, the currency was taken over from Germany, or there is an implicit list of official currencies for each country available for localization as per Note 3107866.

We have a clear requirement from client to go for USD. The reasoning is that we are talking about a global business in the area of cruise/maritime rather than a local Maltese one. They are under a special regulation and are allowed to run accounting and submit reports in USD.

Currently we cannot define USD as neiter Global (non changeable) nor Local currency, which makes planning and management reporting difficult. Only Functional currency can be set to USD, which is not really of use for CO...

Question: can we re-run the CLT process so that the currency for Malta is set to USD?

Thanks beforehand,

Victor

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP Sales Cloud V2 and SAP Emarsys via SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: is a great example for sales cloud v2 connect to Emarsys, can we use custom iflow implement Emarsys update sales cloud v2 contact ?

entry.title: Re: GROW with SAP Learning Roadmap
entry.content:
Hello IkEgh

I would like to share some additional information:

1. You can find Public Cloud related Learning Journeys, Courses, Live Sessions, Hands-on practice, ... here: https://learning.sap.com/products/s4hana-cloud  

2. As Łukasz_Sałek mentioned: for Public cloud we offer one generic certification (C_S4CPB) and 3 Line of Business (LoB) specific Learning Journeys for other LoBs we are offering Records of Achievement, e. g. for Manufacturing.

3. If you are looking for Learning Journey for specific roles you can easily browse by role (within https://learning.sap.com/ --> Browse --> By Role).

Hope this helps, Dieter

entry.title: A company to multiple sales area error
entry.content:
Hi,

1. In the CBC,I have create the sales area 1310/E/00 for company code 1310. I have assigned the plant 1310 for sales area 1310/10/00, So I can’t assign the plant 1310 for sales area 1310/E/00.

 

2. In APP Manage Customer Master Data , for customer , I have maintenance the sales areas 1310/E/00 , but the delivering Plant have to be empty . I want to maintenance the Plant 1310 , But the system show out the error message :

Entry 1310 E 1310 does not exist in TVKWZ (check entry)

Input values must be defined in Table TVKWZ. The value or values '1310 E 1310' are not specified in this table.

 

 

3.In APP Mange Product Master Data , for the distribution chains of Product ,  I have maintenance the sales areas 1310/E , but the delivering Plant have to be empty . I want to maintenance the Plant 1310 , But the system show out the error message :

The plant 1310 does not exist for sales organization 1310 / distr. channel E

 

So the delivering Plant of the sales areas 1310/E  is  empty.

 

4.In App Manage sales orders , I create the sales order  , the sales areas is 1310/E/00 .

I find that the plant of item  is empty , so I entry the plant 1310,the system show out the error message :

Sales from sales organization 1310, dist. chan.E, plant 1310 are not defined

 

My question is how to entry the plant?

entry.title: How to have different welcome emails for Onboarding in IAS?
entry.content:
Hello,

We are implementing Onboarding for IAS, and we have the need to have the welcome email sent to the Onboardee at their creation be different depending on their Legal Entity.

I've created several email templates in IAS for the different Legal Entities, but I struggle for the conditions in the Target: the employee's data in the User entity are only populated with data once the "New Hire Data" step in Onboarding is completed, but we need to have the data since the Onboardee's creation.

Do you know how we can fetch the Onboardee's Legal Entity in IAS from the moment they are created, so as to use it in the conditions in the transformations to select the desired welcome email template?

 

Regards,

William BLANCO

entry.title: Assign classification characteristics to a Document Info Record (DMS) with API
entry.content:
Hi,

i need to assign the classification characteristics to a DMS document via API.

i tried the "Characteristic Data for Classification" API with POST /A_ClfnCharacteristicForKeyDate('{CharcInternalID}')/to_CharacteristicValue 

and this parameters:

CharcInternalID=905

(it's custom characteristic)


and payload:

{
   "CharcValue": "1000030",
      "DocNumber": "10000000034",
      "DocumentType": "ZA2",
      "DocumentPart": "000",
      "DocumentVersion": "00"
}

 

where 10000000034 is my DMS document and 1000030 is a supplier code, but i receive and error.

how can i create or change characteristics for a dms documents?

entry.title: Making a change in SAP Query
entry.content:
Hi All, I have a requirement in my project. There's one SQ01 query in production system for which a Data read. program is created in the infoset for the query. Now in the code, i want to make a change in the where clause for one of the select statement. But I am not able to understand how to make the changes to the data read. program because I am not able to see the query in Development system. Is there any way to move or transfer the query from production to non-prod system.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Currency other than official for a localized country
entry.content:
Dear Victor,

The ISO currency for Malta is EURO, hence in the system you see EURO.

For additional currency options kindly refer to https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/freely-defined-currency-or-additional-currency-functional-currency-in-s/ba-p/13564681 

More details on help documentation about Currencies

Thanks

Sathya Nallusamy

entry.title: Re: Sales Return Copy Data
entry.content: This requirement was not mentioned in your post. For the future, please try to explain your issue more clearly, it will also help you get the answer faster. In the scenario that you have described, do you want to change the division only at the item level? Does your sales order type allow for different divisions on the header and item levels?

entry.title: Re: How BW read/loads archive data after S/4 HANA archiving
entry.content:
Hi, i know this topic is slightly old, but for all who find it as i:

We have used some standard-sap programms / FMs to read the archiveLoads by ArchiveElement back to a ZTable via own coding. Afterwards ABAP-CDS on the new table and load to BI.

Regards,

Lillian

Inchara BK

entry.title: Re: Multiple CVs
entry.content:
No, it is not feasible to upload multiple resumes for a single application. However, when applying for different jobs, a candidate can upload a different resume for each application.

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Without Qty Posting option not appearing
entry.content:
Hi
Without Qty Posting option is not showing in A/p Invoice Debit Memo in one Database . I have done Restore Defaults also in Form Settings.
In another Database on same Hana Server "Without Qty Posting option is showing" . What can be the reason or else i need to check.
Version is 10.00.180 FP2111 on both
Thanks

entry.title: Volunteering and the Importance of Giving Back
entry.content:
April 1st, I felt compelled to commit some time to volunteering at a Junior Achievement Ireland event, happening in the SAP Galway office. 

24 fifth year students from a local Galway school (16 to 17 years old) attended the SAP office with two of their school teachers as part of their curriculum. They got to do and learn so much! Including:

  • See a real-life office and work situation (with the grand tour!)
  • Preparation for future life skills, such as:
    • What to look for in an employer, and what an employer looks for in you
    • How to prepare for a job interview
    • Mock job interviews
  • The infamous, SAP free lunch 😃

It really looked like all enjoyed their day - maybe apart from a few pre-interview nerves! Overall, as a volunteer, I found it a rewarding experience. I was paired to carry out the mock interviews with intern, @Gift_Ola - whom on first impression I found to be very caring, smart, and proactive. I had to think to myself, did I ever volunteer to support others when I was that young?

It was such a rewarding experience, especially to see all the happy faces of the secondary school students, when they were leaving. 

The reason I felt compelled to volunteer, was that I wished deep down there had been something like this, or more opportunities, when I was attending secondary school (way back when!). I was impressed overall with the organization of the event. Sometimes you have to find your own path in life, and at other times - others will help you a little along the way. One of the key takeaways we gave to the students was the importance of networking - which is also what SAP Community is all about. Volunteering is about giving something back to your own community.

I'm interested to hear what motivates you to volunteer, and you might share a few of your own recent photos?!

@StephanieMarley | @RebeccaOLeary | @Gift_Ola | @KunalBansal | @Ruthvik_Chowdary | @lauraschmitz

entry.title: Re: Notification during statuses change
entry.content:
It depends on your configuration. For each status, you can configure a candidate-facing email. If an email is configured for that status, then yes, the candidate will receive the email notification.

Thanks,

Sanjeet

entry.title: Add items from a quote to an existing SAP Sales Order
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a scenario where users need to add line items from existing sales quotes to a previously created sales order in ECC. Is there a standard SAP transaction or a recommended approach to achieve this? We'd like to combine multiple quotes into a single sales order.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: AdT (ABAP in Eclipse), Code Formatter/PrettyPrinter / Beautify - more options?
entry.content: Juuuust in case someone finds this question today or later and doesn't find a good answer: you should try ABAP Cleaner SAP/abap-cleaner: ABAP cleaner applies 95+ cleanup rules to ABAP code at a single keystroke. It's great.

entry.title: Re: Select multiple values on a picklist in the job requi...
entry.content: Job application do not support multiselect field as of now. This can be done only in Job requisition template.

entry.title: Re: No show status in employee profile can the candidate...
entry.content:
Hi,

In the standard solution, this is not directly feasible. However, you can achieve it through API integration via CPI.

Thanks,

Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: email notification to offboarding task responsibles
entry.content: this email is only triggered if review employee data is enabled, but in our case it's not enabled, is there another way please?

entry.title: Sale and leaseback process
entry.content:
Hello,

Does anyone have experience how to implement sale and leaseback process in SAP AA and RE-FX?
Due to nature of this transaction RoU need to be calculated outside the SAP and: 

  • RoU is not equal to the lease liability but is measured as a proportion of the previous carrying amount of the property.
  • RoU asset is depreciated independently from the lease liability.

Any recommendations?

entry.title: Adding Quote Items to Existing Sales Order in ECC
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We're facing a process challenge in ECC. Our users often need to consolidate multiple sales quotes (e.g., 2-3) into a single, existing sales order.

Specifically, they want to:

Identify an existing sales order.
Select line items from different sales quotes.
Add these selected items to the existing sales order.
We're looking for the most efficient and standard SAP-supported way to accomplish this. Are there any specific transactions, BAPIs, or custom development recommendations?

Any insights or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Candidate Deleted After Employee Central Runs
entry.content:
Hi Experts, I have a following case:

We have 2 employees that was hired on january, both have PY processes since it.

On begining of march the system delete the candidate profile os this users (with an automatic routine configured on our instance) and this 2 users have the Employee Central ok, the SAP registers ok for all infotypes, but their Employee Profiles appear "inactive".

The current status on Data Inspector is "d", and I tried to change it to "e" on Integration Center, and after to A of active, but I receive an error.

There is no possible to chaneg this status because the candidate was purged, so I would like to know if you know how to import this informations or correct them for I no to need to purge all user informations and redo the hire, because I don't wnat to have problems on my PY processes.

I appreciate your comments.

 

Best Regards

JC

entry.title: Event Based Revenue Recognition - Provider Contract (Subscription Billing) - (5DQ)
entry.content:
The integration of Subscription Billing with event-based revenue recognition allows you to recognize revenue for subscriptions with customers that are processed as provider contracts.

It is possible to conduct revenue recognition for subscriptions created in SAP Subscription Billing. These subscriptions are stored as provider contract items in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud. With event-based revenue recognition, you can therefore manage revenue recognition for provider contracts. Revenue for provider contract items is recognised based on the billing plan associated with the provider contract item.

 

Overview of the End-to-End Process

Integration between Subscription Billing and S4HANA Cloud

For interactive overview, please visit SAP Help page.

Revenue Recognition Methods for Provider Contracts

Revenue Recognition Key

Revenue Recognition Methods for Provider Contracts

PPC

Provider Contracts 360 Days Calendar Year - No costs deferred

Time-based revenue recognition which is based on billing plan with a 360 days calendar year. No costs are deferred.

PPCA

Provider Contracts 365 Days Calendar Year - No costs deferred

Time-based revenue recognition which is based on billing plan with a 365 days calendar year. No costs are deferred.

PPCN

Periodic Provider Contracts - No revenue recognition

Recognise revenue as accrued

 

In this blog, we will focus on the Revenue Recognition PPCA (365 days) key with also the freeze period in between.

So, we have subscription billing for 1 year. However, there is a freeze period for 6 months after contract started for 3 months. During the freeze period (April - September), there should not be any revenue recognition.

Let's review the subscription billing, 

Contract start date: 01.01.2024

Contract end date: 31.12.2024 

In the line item 2, we have recurring charge type (02) and we maintained Rev Rec Key PPCA.

However, we also have a freeze period between April - September. The contract resume on 1st October, 2024.

This is the result of Event-Based Revenue Recognition - Provider Contracts.

We can use Product and Margin Fiori App to see the Revenue, Cost and Margin in Provider Contract. And as expected, we do not have any revenue from period 3 to period 9.

Quick look on the SSCUI 105138 - Derivation of Recognition Key for Provider Contracts, we can define the Rev Rec Key based on Company code, Charge Type and Product dimension.

I can recommend to read this blog Subscription Billing with Convergent Invoicing and Contract-Based Revenue Recognition from @volkmar_zahn

entry.title: Re: Auto Warehouse task creation after Goods receipt is done in putaway
entry.content: As the WOCR logic , you will have to check the activity PTWY within SPRO ->SCM EWM-EWM-Crosss process setting ->Warehouse order -> "Define Search Sequence of Creation Rules for Activity Areas"

entry.title: USE OF AI IN ECLIPSE
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to use AI in eclipse. My requirement is like this,

I want to auto generate CDS, Database tables , domain , data elements, directly in my package using the Prompt, now we have AI options like 

1)  Joule 

But Joule serves primarily as an assistant to enhance productivity. It offers AI-based capabilities that help in understanding complex development objects, generating code snippets, and providing interactive support through a chat interface.

for joule i have used this blog.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/joule-speaks-abap/ba-p/14018226

2) i have read this post also, which may be the possible way to achieve this functionality

I have gone through this post but its in beta and beta features are enabled in my cockpit, and still i am not able to see that option in my eclipse.  

teched2024-AD180/exercises/ex01/README.md at main · SAP-samples/teched2024-AD180 · GitHub

Can any one suggest me a solution, it will be helpful 

Thanks,

Basant

entry.title: Re: Hide fields for Onboardee but not for recruiter
entry.content:
Hi,

You can try to hide this via RBP. In RBP, for each object's fields, there is an option called 'Field Level Override.' Under Field Level Override, you can specify which fields should be visible and which should be hidden.

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: Build and Launch a Simple Spring Boot App(web-service) on SAP BTP
entry.content: @manojkumargct in your manifest.yml the buildpacks configuration is commented! hence CF runtime when preparing to deploy cant figure out what to deploy!

entry.title: Re: Upcoming Removal of SAP Fiori Themes Belize and Blue Crystal
entry.content:
Hi Thomas,

your colleague @OliverGraeff @ was faster 🙂

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/announcement-removal-of-belize-theme-of-sap-fiori/ba-p/14061924

entry.title: Re: Freely Defined Currency or Additional Currency + Functional Currency in S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Re: Blog it Forward - Raquel Cunha - version 2025
entry.content: @Raquel_Pereira_da_Cunha  Bravo! Very inspiring! A real journey down memory lane and it was a pleasure meeting you in SAP TechEd:). Thank you for keeping the BIF spirit after almost 13 years:)

entry.title: Re: Currency other than official for a localized country
entry.content: Thank you Satya!

entry.title: Re: Currency other than official for a localized country
entry.content: Thank you Sathya! I understand what is official/ISO currency for a country. Is there an option to deviate from this in CLT, given client's requirement?
